title: Feather Sword
description:
A simple mod that adds a feather sword, it can lunch other mobs around you in the sky
( players too in version O.2 )
body:
A mod that adds a few feather themed items including new crafting materials and a special feather sword.
It's a simple mod that i made for my friends to play around with and for all of you to enjoy too.

This sword when used, can launch mobs that are 3 blocks far up in the sky, and gives them slow falling temporarly.

PS: _Thanks to Vbinnie and Endy for helping me_
Contact at: yahiahoal27@gmail.com
